home.title: KurdMap
home.subtitle: Kurdish Businesses across Germany
home.heroText: Find Kurdish restaurants, barbers, hotels, and services near you.

business.notFoundHint: The business you're looking for doesn't exist or has been removed.

footer.description: A multilingual platform for discovering Kurdish businesses in Germany.

intro.title: Privacy Policy
intro.text: KurdMap respects your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal data when you use our platform.

dataCollection.title: Data Collection
dataCollection.text: We collect only the data necessary to provide our services: business listings, search queries, and account information for registered business owners. We do not collect unnecessary personal data.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.text: We use essential cookies for language preferences and session management. We do not use tracking cookies or share your data with advertising networks.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Services
thirdParty.text: We use OpenStreetMap for map display and Google Fonts for typography. These services may collect anonymous usage data according to their own privacy policies.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.text: Under GDPR, you have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. You may also request data portability or object to processing. Contact us to exercise these rights.

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: For privacy-related questions, please contact us at info@kurdmap.eu.

accountDeletion.title: Account Deletion
accountDeletion.text: You can delete your account at any time from the Profile settings in the app. Upon deletion, all your personal data including reviews, favorites, and login credentials will be permanently removed from our servers within 30 days. To request manual deletion, contact info@kurdmap.eu.

howItWorks.title: How KurdMap Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Simple Steps
howItWorks.step1Desc: Enter a business name, category, or city to find Kurdish businesses near you.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Browse through verified business listings with reviews, photos, and opening hours.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Contact businesses directly, get directions, or share with friends.

trustStats.title: Trusted by the Kurdish Community
trustStats.subtitle: Connecting Kurdish businesses with their community across Germany.

newsletter.title: Stay Updated
newsletter.subtitle: Get notified about new businesses and features. No spam, just useful updates.
newsletter.disclaimer: We respect your privacy. Unsubscribe anytime.

appCta.title: KurdMap in Your Pocket
appCta.subtitle: Soon available as a mobile app. Find Kurdish businesses on the go with location-based search and notifications.

about.title: About KurdMap
about.subtitle: A multilingual platform making Kurdish businesses visible across Germany.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: KurdMap connects the Kurdish community with local businesses across Germany. We provide a free, multilingual platform where Kurdish restaurants, barbers, hotels, and services can be easily found.

multilingual.title: 4 Languages
multilingual.text: Available in Kurdish (Sorani), Kurdish (Kurmanji), German, and English.

map.title: Map-Based Search
map.text: Find businesses near you with interactive map view and location-based search.

mobile.title: Mobile Friendly
mobile.text: Optimized for all devices — use KurdMap on the go from your smartphone.

verified.title: Verified Listings
verified.text: Reviewed business listings with up-to-date information and opening hours.

openSource.title: Community Project
openSource.text: KurdMap is a community project that strengthens the visibility of Kurdish businesses in Germany.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have questions or want to register your business? We're happy to help.

form.name: Your Name
form.successText: Thank you for your message. We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
form.error: An error occurred while sending your message. Please try again.

categories.title: All Categories
categories.subtitle: Browse Kurdish businesses by category — from restaurants to services.

q1.a: KurdMap is a free multilingual platform for discovering Kurdish businesses across Germany. It supports Kurdish (Sorani), Kurdish (Kurmanji), German, and English.

q2.q: How can I add my business?
q2.a: Currently, businesses can be added by contacting us at info@kurdmap.eu. A self-service registration will be available soon.

q3.a: Yes! KurdMap is completely free for both users searching for businesses and business owners listing their services.

q4.a: KurdMap covers Kurdish businesses across all of Germany. We are continuously expanding our listings.

q5.q: How do I report incorrect information?
q5.a: If you find incorrect information about a business, please contact us at info@kurdmap.eu and we will correct it promptly.

search.title: Search Results
search.noResultsHint: Try adjusting your filters or using a different search term.

search.locationDenied: Location access denied. Please allow in browser settings.
